channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Anthony Albanese and the Need for Clearer Communication in the Trump Era
item.description: In the midst of ongoing tensions caused by US President Donald Trump’s unpredictable actions, Australian Prime Minister Anthony Albanese has come under scrutiny for his cautious approach to internatio...

item.title: Successful Test of Parachute Landing System for Gaganyaan Crew Capsule
item.description: The Indian Space Research Organisation (ISRO) has successfully tested the Parachute Landing System for the Gaganyaan crew module, a significant milestone for India's first manned space mission. This t...

item.title: Tyson Fury vs Arslanbek Makhmudov: Fight details and how to watch
item.description: Tyson Fury is making his fifth comeback from retirement to face Arslanbek Makhmudov in a highly anticipated boxing match at the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium in London. Fury, who has previously lost twice...

item.title: Trump threaten fresh military action against Iran if Pakistan talks collapse
item.description: President Donald Trump don warn say US warships dey reload with top quality weapons to strike Iran if the ongoing talks wey go happen for Pakistan no produce any good deal. For interview wey e give Ne...

item.title: Coach Busari releases 36-player list for Nigeria’s U-17 Women’s World Cup qualifiers
item.description: New head coach of Nigeria’s U-17 women’s football team, the Flamingos, Akeem Ishola Busari, don release list of 36 girls wey go represent the country for the second round of the 2026 FIFA U-17 Women’s...

item.title: Savouge Spin Doctors secure comeback victory against AEP-Cabstars in Spikers' Turf match
item.description: In the ongoing 2026 Spikers' Turf Open Conference, the Savouge Spin Doctors pulled off an impressive comeback win against AEP-Cabstars. The match showcased high-level volleyball action as Savouge over...

item.title: California Bill Aims to Mandate Ingredient Disclosure for Baby Products
item.description: A proposed law in California seeks to mandate ingredient disclosure for baby products, raising concerns about potential health risks associated with chemicals used in these items. The legislation, dri...

item.title: Economic Slowdown in the U.S. Poses Risks for Canadian Economy
item.description: Canadian economists are closely monitoring the economic situation in the United States, where multiple stressors are affecting growth and consumer confidence. U.S. grocery and gas prices are high, job...

item.title: D-Prize Offers KSh 2.5 Million to Support First-Time Entrepreneurs in Kenya and Beyond
item.description: D-Prize, a global non-profit organisation focused on reducing poverty through effective distribution of proven solutions, has launched its 2026 Global Competition. The initiative invites first-time en...

item.title: Chris Potoski: From a troubled youth to a seasoned entrepreneur and devoted family man
item.description: Chris Potoski is an American business executive best known as the husband of adult film actress Brandi Love. Born on April 13, 1972, in North Carolina, his journey to success started from humble and c...

item.title: Trump criticizes Iran over Strait of Hormuz navigation during ceasefire
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has publicly criticised Iran for not fully complying with a recent ceasefire agreement, specifically regarding the free passage of oil through the Strait of Hormuz. The cea...

item.title: Anil Kumble urges patience in fast-tracking 15-year-old Vaibhav Suryavanshi into Indian cricket team
item.description: In a recent event organised by Barclays at the Cricket Club of India in Mumbai, former India captain and legendary leg-spinner Anil Kumble advised caution regarding the growing demands to include 15-y...

item.title: Zanzibar Police Arrest 10 Over False Genital Theft Claims Triggering Mob Violence
item.description: Police in Zanzibar’s Mjini Magharibi region have arrested 10 individuals following false allegations that their genitals were stolen by unknown people. The incidents started on April 4 in Magomeni are...

item.title: Fremantle edge past Collingwood after seizing key moments in scrappy encounter
item.description: In a rain-soaked Friday night clash at Adelaide's Gather Round, Fremantle snatched a gritty win over Collingwood, overcoming a largely dour contest through two decisive bursts of attacking play. The D...

item.title: US and Iran prepare for peace talks amid Strait of Hormuz tensions
item.description: US Vice President JD Vance has left for Islamabad to engage in peace negotiations with Iran, urging Tehran not to manipulate the talks. The discussions are aimed at solidifying a fragile ceasefire fol...

item.title: Pope Leo XIV Advocates for Peace Amid Tensions with Trump Administration
item.description: Pope Leo XIV, the first American-born pope, delivered a message of peace during his Easter Mass at the Vatican on April 5, 2026. The pontiff called on world leaders to prioritize dialogue over violenc...

item.title: Amy Goodman’s Legacy in Independent Journalism and Her Fight Against Power
item.description: Amy Goodman, the host and cofounder of Democracy Now!, has become a symbol of independent journalism through her relentless commitment to giving voice to social movements around the globe. In a new do...

item.title: At least 10 dead and several rescued after boat accident in Yamuna river, Mathura
item.description: In a tragic incident on Friday afternoon, a boat carrying approximately 25 to 27 people capsized in the Yamuna river near Mathura, Uttar Pradesh, resulting in the death of at least ten people. Accordi...

item.title: Iranian Officials Set to Meet U.S. Delegation in Islamabad Amid Ceasefire Talks
item.description: An Iranian delegation, led by Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi and Parliament Speaker Mohammad-Bagher Ghalibaf, is expected to arrive in Islamabad on Friday for high-level discussions with U.S. officia...

item.title: LAUSD Teachers, Staff, and Administrators Face Historic Strike as Parents Struggle with Childcare and Education Disruptions
item.description: Parents across Los Angeles Unified School District are scrambling to adjust work schedules, secure alternative childcare, and ensure their children continue receiving meals as a potential massive stri...
